title: RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN parse failure silently uses default without warning
description: main.rs line 73: RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN uses .and_then(v.parse().ok()).unwrap_or(120), silently falling back to 120 on invalid input. All other env vars (KEEPALIVE_SECS, SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI, SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS) explicitly warn via tracing::warn on parse failure. An operator who typos the var name or value gets no signal that their rate limit config was ignored.
